# Pull request

## What this changes

Describe the change in one to three sentences. Why, not what.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New lint rule
- [ ] New style token (please follow `CONTRIBUTING.md`)
- [ ] Eval report
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Build / packaging

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` produces no errors
- [ ] `npx ahd validate-tokens` passes (if tokens changed)
- [ ] Added or updated tests that would have caught the bug or proven the feature
- [ ] Updated `docs/` where relevant
- [ ] Every commit is signed off (`git commit -s`) per DCO

## Related

Link any related issue, eval report, or token proposal.
